display.purpose: Hero headlines only. Max 6rem. Letter-spacing floor -0.03em.

label.purpose: Buttons, nav links, form labels, metadata.

mono.purpose: Score percentages, data values, progress labels.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary CTA. Near-black background, white text. Used for main actions like 'Mulai Tes'.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; padding: 12px 28px; border-radius: 8px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; border: none; cursor: pointer; background: #0c0c0c; color: #fff; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #2a2a2a; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0d7377; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Secondary action. Transparent with border. Used for 'Pelajari Lebih Lanjut'.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; padding: 12px 28px; border-radius: 8px; font-weight: 500; font-size: 14px; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; border: 1px solid #e5e5e5; cursor: pointer; background: transparent; color: #555; text-decoration: none; transition: border-color 0.2s ease, color 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { border-color: #0c0c0c; color: #0c0c0c; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0d7377; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Subtle inline action. No border, minimal padding.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 8px; font-weight: 500; font-size: 14px; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; border: none; cursor: pointer; background: transparent; color: #555; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #f8f8f8; color: #0c0c0c; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0d7377; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Standard content container. White background, 1px light border, 12px radius.
components.html:
Card Title

Card content goes here. Quiet, contained, purposeful.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #fff; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #f0f0f0; transition: border-color 0.2s ease; } .ds-card:hover { border-color: #e5e5e5; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Text input with 1px border, 8px radius. Focus shifts border to Abyssal Teal.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; padding: 12px 16px; border: 1px solid #e5e5e5; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 14px; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; color: #0c0c0c; background: #fff; transition: border-color 0.2s ease; outline: none; box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #0d7377; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #999; } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0d7377; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Progress Bar
components.description: Minimal 4px progress bar with rounded caps. Fill color varies by Dark Triad dimension.
components.css: .ds-progress-track { width: 100%; height: 4px; background: #f0f0f0; border-radius: 999px; overflow: hidden; } .ds-progress-fill { height: 100%; border-radius: 999px; transition: width 0.8s ease; }

components.name: Navigation Bar
components.description: Fixed top navigation with glass effect. Logo + desktop links + mobile hamburger.
components.html:
🧠ShadowSelf
BerandaMulai Tes
components.css: .ds-nav { position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 50; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.85); backdrop-filter: blur(16px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(16px); border-bottom: 1px solid #f0f0f0; } .ds-nav-inner { max-width: 1120px; margin: 0 auto; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; height: 56px; padding: 0 24px; } .ds-nav-logo { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; text-decoration: none; color: #0c0c0c; font-weight: 700; font-size: 14px; } .ds-nav-icon { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 28px; height: 28px; border-radius: 8px; background: #0d7377; color: #fff; font-size: 12px; } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; } .ds-nav-links a { padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 8px; font-weight: 500; font-size: 14px; text-decoration: none; color: #555; transition: background 0.2s ease; } .ds-nav-links a:hover { background: #f8f8f8; color: #0c0c0c; } .ds-nav-cta { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 8px 20px !important; border-radius: 8px; font-weight: 600 !important; background: #0c0c0c !important; color: #fff !important; } .ds-nav-cta:hover { background: #2a2a2a !important; }

narrative.overview:
ShadowSelf's visual system is a mirror that doesn't flatter and doesn't distort — it simply reflects what's there. The interface exists to create space for a difficult conversation with oneself, not to distract or entertain. Every pixel is in service of that stillness.

The system is refined and restrained: buttons don't shout, cards don't float, colors don't compete. The deep teal accent ("Abyssal Teal") appears sparingly — not as decoration, but as a quiet signal: this is where to look, this is what matters. The palette is intentionally narrow: near-black ink, cool gray neutrals, and one accent that carries the emotional weight of the brand.

This system explicitly rejects: gamified personality tests (16Personalities), corporate wellness warmth (BetterHelp), generic SaaS gradients, and decorative aesthetics that substitute substance for style.
keyCharacteristics: Flat by default, no shadows — depth is conveyed through tonal layering and borders, not elevation
Narrow, intentional palette — one accent, cool neutrals, no decorative colors
Typography-forward — Inter at multiple weights carries the hierarchy, not color or decoration
Generous whitespace — rhythm over density, room to breathe over information packing
Still, not empty — every element has purpose; nothing exists 'just because'

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Abyssal Teal is the only accent. It appears on ≤10% of any given screen. If a second accent color appears outside the Dark Triad data colors, the design has drifted.

rules.name: The Data-Only Rule
rules.body: Narcissus, Machiavellian, and Psychopath colors are reserved exclusively for score displays and progress bars. They never appear in navigation, buttons, or decorative elements.

rules.name: The Weight-Only Hierarchy Rule
rules.body: Hierarchy is expressed through weight and size, not through color, tracking, or case changes. No uppercase eyebrows, no wide tracking on labels, no colored headings.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: No surface casts a shadow. If an element needs to feel distinct, use tonal layering (surface → bg) or a border shift. box-shadow is prohibited.

dos: Do use Abyssal Teal sparingly — ≤10% of any screen. Its rarity is its power.
Do use tonal layering (surface → bg → bgAlt) to create depth instead of shadows.
Do keep body text at inkMuted (#555555) or darker — meets WCAG AA 4.5:1.
Do use text-wrap: balance on headings and text-wrap: pretty on body text.
Do cap body line length at 65–75ch.
Do use the Dark Triad colors (purple, amber, emerald) exclusively for score data.
Do use Inter at different weights for hierarchy — weight shifts do the work.
Do keep cards flat with a 1px bordLight border — no shadows, no lift.
donts: Don't gamify the interface — no badges, no achievements, no progress celebrations. This is not 16Personalities.
Don't use corporate wellness warmth — no fake-warm tones, no stock photos of smiling people, no 'you're great!' messaging. This is not BetterHelp.
Don't use gradient backgrounds, gradient text, or purple-blue SaaS gradients anywhere.
Don't use glassmorphism, blur overlays, or decorative backdrop filters outside the nav bar.
Don't use illustrations — no Lottie, no SVG sketches, no hand-drawn elements. If you can't render it with type and layout, don't render it.
Don't use uppercase tracked eyebrows ('ABOUT', 'PROCESS') above section headings.
Don't use numbered section markers (01, 02, 03) as default scaffolding.
Don't use box-shadow on any surface — cards, buttons, or containers.
Don't use border-radius larger than 12px on cards or containers. Pill shapes are for progress bars only.
Don't pair border + shadow on the same element. Pick one.
Don't use decorative patterns, repeating backgrounds, or diagonal stripes.
Don't use the Dark Triad data colors outside of score displays.
